question: What is the movie title of Big George? movie title refers to movie.title; Big George refers to 'Character Name' = 'Big George';

orig_evidence: power ID refers to superpower.id; cryokinesis refers to power_name = 'cryokinesis';

question: What are the movies of actors with ID 1?  movies refers to title; actors with ID 1 refers to actor_id = 1;

evidence: movies refers to title; actors with ID 1 refers to actor_id = 1;

gold_sql: SELECT T3.title FROM actor as T1 INNER JOIN film_actor AS T2 ON T1.actor_id = T2.actor_id INNER JOIN film as T3 ON T2.film_id = T3.film_id WHERE T1.actor_id = 1
orig_gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T2.power_name FROM hero_power AS T1 INNER JOIN superpower AS T2 ON T1.power_id = T2.id WHERE T1.hero_id = 1

question: How many titles did New Moon Books publish?  titles that New Moon Books published refers to pub_name = 'New Moon Books'

question: What is the name of the football league in the country of Netherlands? name of the football league refers to divisions.name;
orig_question: What is the name of the football league in the country of Netherlands? name of the football league refers to League.name;
orig_masked: What is the [C5] of the [T2] in the [T1] of [V1]? [C5] of the [T2] refers to [T2].[C5];; [V1] is a value of the column [C2]
evidence: name of the football league refers to divisions.name;
orig_evidence: name of the football league refers to League.name;
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM divisions WHERE country = 'Netherlands'

question: What is ALAMO VIDEOTAPE's category?  ALAMO VIDEOTAPE refers to title = 'ALAMO VIDEOTAPE'; category refers to category.name;
orig_question: What is Abomination's superpower?  Abomination refers to superhero_name = 'Abomination'; superpower refers to power_name;
orig_masked: What is [V1]'s [T10]?  [V1] refers to [C28] = '[V1]'; [T10] refers to [C31];; [V1] is a value of the column [C28]
evidence: ALAMO VIDEOTAPE refers to title = 'ALAMO VIDEOTAPE'; category refers to category.name;
orig_evidence: Abomination refers to superhero_name = 'Abomination'; superpower refers to power_name;
gold_sql: SELECT T3.name FROM film AS T1 INNER JOIN film_category AS T2 ON T1.film_id = T2.film_id INNER JOIN category AS T3 ON T2.category_id = T3.category_id WHERE T1.title = 'ALAMO VIDEOTAPE'
orig_gold_sql: SELECT T3.power_name FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_power AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN superpower AS T3 ON T2.power_id = T3.id WHERE T1.superhero_name = 'Abomination'

question: How many dining establishments were given an Fail result? dining refers to facility_type = 'Restaurant'; Fail result refers to results='Fail'

orig_evidence: female refers to SEX = 'F'; APS diagnosis refers to Diagnosis='APS'
gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.license_no) FROM establishment AS T1 INNER JOIN inspection AS T2 ON T1.license_no = T2.license_no WHERE T2.results = 'Fail' AND T1.facility_type = 'Restaurant'

question: What are Minna Maarit Aalto's height, weight, and region? Minna Maarit Aalto's refers to full_name = 'Minna Maarit Aalto'
orig_question: What are Alexis Blin's sprint speed, agility, and acceleration scores? Alexis Blin's refers to player_name = 'Alexis Blin'
orig_masked: What are [V1]'s [C164], [C130], and [C128] [T5]? [V1]'s refers to [C126] = '[V1]'; [V1] is a value of the column [C126]
evidence: Minna Maarit Aalto's refers to full_name = 'Minna Maarit Aalto'
orig_evidence: Alexis Blin's refers to player_name = 'Alexis Blin'
gold_sql: SELECT T1.height, T1.weight, T3.region_name FROM person as T1 INNER JOIN person_region as T2 ON T1.id = T2.person_id INNER JOIN noc_region AS T3 ON T2.region_id = T3.id WHERE T1.full_name = 'Minna Maarit Aalto'

question: State the district name and community area name for crime report number '23757'.  district_name, community_area_name contains the information about district name and community area name respectively.
orig_question: State the district and region for loan ID '4990'.  A2, A3 contains the information about district and region respectively.
orig_masked: State the [C24] and [C25] for [C37] '[V1]'.  [C24], [C25] contains the information about [C24] and [C25] respectively.; [V1] is a value of the column [C37]

orig_evidence: A2, A3 contains the information about district and region respectively.
gold_sql: SELECT T2.district_name, T3.community_area_name FROM Crime as T1 INNER JOIN District AS T2 ON T1.district_no = T2.district_no INNER JOIN Community_Area AS T3 ON T1.community_area_no = T3.community_area_no WHERE T1.report_no = 23757
